title: wahlenbergia krebsii subsp. krebsii
intro: Wahlenbergia krebsii subsp. krebsii, also known as the bluebell of the Karroo, is a flowering plant species in the family Campanulaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as digestive problems. The herbal preparations of Wahlenbergia krebsii subsp. krebsii include infusions and decoctions, which are typically made by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water.
